matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: ACE2 spike-binding model (ACE2 receptor-binding functional model)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an ACE2 receptor-peptidase thesis: the individual may carry research context relevant to angiotensin peptide processing, vascular or cardiopulmonary biology, ACE2 expression, or viral spike-receptor interaction studies. This is not a deterministic infection-risk or cardiovascular-risk call.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed rs2285666 dosage suggests this sample carries the ACE2 prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. The variant observed in this sample suggests an ACE2 receptor-peptidase thesis: the individual may carry research context relevant to angiotensin peptide processing, vascular or cardiopulmonary biology, ACE2 expression, or viral spike-receptor interaction studies. This is not a deterministic infection-risk or cardiovascular-risk call. This specific marker is curated as ACE2 regulatory/splice-region expression marker. rs2285666 is curated as a ACE2 marker for Renin-angiotensin system biology, Cardiopulmonary and vascular research. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched rs2285666 at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the ACE2 prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Can modify or tag renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses every numeric beta value that survived preprocessing for the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an ACE2 receptor-peptidase thesis: the individual may carry research context relevant to angiotensin peptide processing, vascular or cardiopulmonary biology, ACE2 expression, or viral spike-receptor interaction studies. This is not a deterministic infection-risk or cardiovascular-risk call. An observed ACE2 variant places this sample in the curated ACE2 research context. The local ACE2 bundle is cardiopulmonary, vascular, and receptor-biology oriented. ACE2 variants are mostly research-context modifiers unless externally classified and phenotypically anchored. ACE2 regulatory and coding variants can be studied for expression, peptide balance, cardiovascular traits, or host-pathogen interaction context.
cases.rationale: This is the base thesis that activates as soon as any promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta
cases.prediction: When a ACE2 variant is paired with high methylation in the whitelist mean beta, the sample best fits a combined regulatory-context thesis. This pattern leans toward stronger regulatory restraint or reduced local accessibility around the locus. The variant side of the thesis is: The variant observed in this sample suggests an ACE2 receptor-peptidase thesis: the individual may carry research context relevant to angiotensin peptide processing, vascular or cardiopulmonary biology, ACE2 expression, or viral spike-receptor interaction studies. This is not a deterministic infection-risk or cardiovascular-risk call. ACE2 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data. The local ACE2 bundle is cardiopulmonary, vascular, and receptor-biology oriented. ACE2 variants are mostly research-context modifiers unless externally classified and phenotypically anchored. ACE2 regulatory and coding variants can be studied for expression, peptide balance, cardiovascular traits, or host-pathogen interaction context.
